title: Fractions greater than 1 on the number line
description: Plot and spot fractions greater than 1 on the number line.
topic_path: Fractions greater than 1 on the number line

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $\dfrac42$ on the number line.**


[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The denominator in $\dfrac{4}{2}$, is $2$. So, each equal part on the number line is equal to $\dfrac{1}{2}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

We need to move $\dfrac12$ on the number line $4$ times to reach $\greenD{\dfrac42}$.  



[[☃ image 1]]

The answer looks like this:  

[[☃ number-line 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which point is at $\dfrac{4}{​3}$ on the number line?**
 
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The denominator in $\dfrac{4}{3}$, is $3$. 

So, there should be $3$ equal parts in each whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The numerator in $\dfrac{4}{3}$, is $4$. 

So, there should be $4$ equal parts shaded.



[[☃ image 1]]



Which number line shows a point located at $\dfrac{4}{3}$?
Number line $\maroonD{B}$ shows a point located is at $\dfrac{4}{3}.$

choices.content: $\greenD{A}$ ![A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, two unlabeled tick marks, a tick mark labeled 1, two unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 2. A green dot appears at the second tick mark after 0.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6fb94ecb1bec43f703f3c601c73b6dce4283e02c)

$\maroonD{B}$ ![A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, two unlabeled tick marks, a tick mark labeled 1, two unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 2. A pink dot appears at the first tick mark after 1.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d76440b6cca759f442ec97dd0480cd6483cbad56)

$\blueD{C}$ ![A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, three unlabeled tick marks, a tick mark labeled 1, three unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 2. A blue dot appears at the tick mark at 1.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c261d83de23f377e7c5738b095d4f52e42f07251)

assessment_items.question_content:
**What fraction is located at Point $A$ on the number line?**

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
Each whole has $6$ equal parts, so each part has a length of $\dfrac{1}{6}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

To reach point $A$, we need to move $\dfrac{1}{6}$ seven times.



[[☃ image 1]]

Point $A$ is located at $\dfrac{7}{6}$.

options.alt: A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, five unlabeled tick marks, a tick mark at 1, five unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 2. Point A is at the first tick mark after 1.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What fraction is located at Point $A$ on the number line?**



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
Each whole has $4$ equal parts, so each part has a length of $\dfrac{1}{4}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

To reach point $A$, we need to move $\dfrac{1}{4}$ six times.



[[☃ image 1]]

Point $A$ is located at $\dfrac{6}{4}$.

options.alt: A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, three unlabeled tick marks, a tick mark at 1, three unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 2. Point A is at the second tick mark after 1.

assessment_items.question_content:

[[☃ image 1]]

To reach point $A$, we need to move $\dfrac{1}{2}$ three times.



[[☃ image 1]]

Point $A$ is located at $\dfrac{3}{2}$.

options.alt: A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, an unlabeled tick mark, a tick mark at 1, an unlabeled tick mark, and an ending tick mark at 2. Point A is at the first tick mark after 1.
